landing.subtitle1: Frictionless time tracking, built for deep work.
landing.subtitle2: No clutter. No noise. Just focus.
landing.privacy: All data stored locally · No account required

app.title: Time Log
app.description: Track and review all your logged work sessions.

table.empty_desc: Start a task using the timer in the navbar to begin tracking your work.

modal.start_desc: Enter the task details to begin tracking your time.
modal.edit_desc: Modify the task details for this time entry.
modal.manual_desc: Add a completed time entry with custom start and end times.
modal.time_error: End time must be after start time.
modal.delete_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this time entry? This action cannot be undone.

sync.title: Sync to Google Sheets
sync.desc_connected: Your time logs are automatically synced after every session.
sync.desc_disconnected: Connect your Google account to back up your time logs to a private spreadsheet.
sync.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

toast.sync_expired: Google session expired — please reconnect to resume syncing.
toast.sync_background_failed: Background sync failed, but local data is safe
toast.save_failed: Failed to save time record locally
toast.sync_failed: Failed to sync with Google Sheets
